glm-copilot.walkthrough.title: GLM Models for GitHub Copilot Chat
glm-copilot.walkthrough.description: Set up GLM models in GitHub Copilot Chat.
glm-copilot.walkthrough.setApiKey.title: Set your GLM API key
glm-copilot.walkthrough.setApiKey.descri:
[Get an API key](command:glm-copilot.getApiKey) from z.ai or bigmodel.cn.
[Set API Key](command:glm-copilot.setApiKey)
glm-copilot.walkthrough.chooseApi.title: Choose your GLM API
glm-copilot.walkthrough.chooseApi.descri:
Select between the GLM Coding Plan and the Standard API, and choose your region.
[Open settings](command:glm-copilot.openSettings)
glm-copilot.walkthrough.showModels.title: Show GLM models in the picker
glm-copilot.walkthrough.showModels.descr:
Your GLM models appear in the Copilot Chat model picker, filtered by your selected API Mode. If they are hidden, open the Language Models manager to show them.
[Open Language Models](command:workbench.action.chat.manage)
glm-copilot.config.title: GLM Models for GitHub Copilot Chat
glm-copilot.config.apiMode.description:
Which GLM API to use.

- **Coding Plan** — uses your GLM Coding Plan subscription ([Z.ai](https://z.ai/manage-apikey/subscription) International or [bigmodel.cn](https://bigmodel.cn/coding-plan/personal/overview) Mainland China). The active endpoint depends on the `region` setting. Best for teams or heavy coding use.
- **Standard API** — pay-as-you-go access via the GLM Open Platform. The active endpoint depends on the `region` setting.
glm-copilot.config.apiMode.codingPlan.de: Use your GLM Coding Plan subscription. The endpoint depends on `region`: International → `api.z.ai/api/coding/paas/v4`, Mainland China → `open.bigmodel.cn/api/coding/paas/v4`.
glm-copilot.config.apiMode.standard.desc: Pay-as-you-go access via the GLM Open Platform. The active endpoint is chosen by the `region` setting.
glm-copilot.config.region.description:
Server region for **Coding Plan** and **Standard API** modes (ignored when `baseUrl` is set).

- **International** (Z.ai account) — Coding Plan `api.z.ai/api/coding/paas/v4`, Standard `api.z.ai/api/paas/v4`
- **Mainland China** (Zhipu AI account) — Coding Plan `open.bigmodel.cn/api/coding/paas/v4`, Standard `open.bigmodel.cn/api/paas/v4`
glm-copilot.config.region.china.label: Mainland China (bigmodel.cn)
glm-copilot.config.baseUrl.description: Override the GLM API base URL. When set, this value is used verbatim and both `apiMode` and `region` are ignored. Use this for self-hosted proxies or compatible third-party endpoints.
glm-copilot.config.maxTokens.description: Maximum number of output tokens per request. Set to `0` to use the API default (no explicit limit). Useful for controlling costs.
glm-copilot.config.modelIdOverrides.desc: Remap a built-in model's API id. Keys are the model id shown in the picker (e.g. `glm-4.7`); values are the id sent to the API. Use this for proxies or regional endpoints (such as bigmodel.cn) that use different model names. To add brand-new models, use `customModels` instead.
glm-copilot.config.customModels.descript: Add your own GLM models to the picker. Each entry is either a model id string (e.g. `"glm-4.7"`) or an object such as `{ "id": "my-model", "name": "My Model", "maxInputTokens": 200000 }`. Custom models always appear regardless of API Mode and are sent to the active endpoint.
glm-copilot.config.thinking.description:
Whether GLM uses step-by-step reasoning before answering. Applies to models that support thinking.

- **On** — higher quality on complex coding and agent tasks (slower).
- **Off** — faster responses for simple edits.
glm-copilot.config.debugLogging.descript: Enable verbose debug logging to the GLM output channel. Use [`GLM: Show Logs`](command:glm-copilot.showLogs) to view the channel. Logs may include request metadata but not prompt text.
glm-copilot.config.usageRefreshIntervalM: How often (in minutes) to refresh the GLM Coding Plan usage status bar. Minimum 5. The status bar only appears for the Coding Plan on the International (z.ai) region.
glm-copilot.config.showUsageStatusBar.de: Show the GLM Coding Plan usage status-bar item. Only applies to Coding Plan keys on the International (z.ai) region.
